text.message: black that was a crazy game we just played

once he knew he had army he didn't need to keep blocking me
I needed army to win there

that's a hard sell. kind of depends on where my 2nd placement can go

prob leavesz me competing with someone else but oh well

you prefer the wood right with access to port?
if I got 9 10 11 you will take the 4 wood spot
